# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy
  - notify

variables:
  GIT_STRATEGY: fetch
  GIT_DEPTH: "0"

workflow:
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_TAG

default:
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache git curl jq || true
    - |
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID" ]; then
        export MR_TITLE="${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE:-$(curl --silent --header "JOB-TOKEN: $CI_JOB_TOKEN" "$CI_API_V4_URL/projects/$CI_PROJECT_ID/merge_requests/$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID" | jq -r '.title')}"
        export MR_DESCRIPTION="${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION:-$(curl --silent --header "JOB-TOKEN: $CI_JOB_TOKEN" "$CI_API_V4_URL/projects/$CI_PROJECT_ID/merge_requests/$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID" | jq -r '.description')}"
      else
        export MR_TITLE=""
        export MR_DESCRIPTION=""
      fi
    - export RELEASE_NOTES="$(printf '%s\n\n%s' "$MR_TITLE" "$MR_DESCRIPTION" | sed '/^[[:space:]]*$/d')"

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building for: ${MR_TITLE:-$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}"
    - echo "$RELEASE_NOTES" > release-notes.txt
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - release-notes.txt
    expire_in: 1 week
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH

test:
  stage: test
  script:
    - echo "Running tests for: ${MR_TITLE:-$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}"
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - export DEPLOY_TAG="$(echo "${MR_TITLE:-$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | tr -cs 'a-z0-9._-' '-')-${CI_PIPELINE_ID}"
    - echo "Deploying tag: $DEPLOY_TAG"
    - git tag -a "$DEPLOY_TAG" -m "Deploy: ${MR_TITLE:-$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}"
    - git push origin "$DEPLOY_TAG"
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"

notify:
  stage: notify
  script:
    - |
      MESSAGE="Deployment complete"
      if [ -n "$MR_TITLE" ]; then
        MESSAGE="$MESSAGE: $MR_TITLE"
      fi
      if [ -n "$MR_DESCRIPTION" ]; then
        MESSAGE="$MESSAGE
      $MR_DESCRIPTION"
      fi
      echo "$MESSAGE"
      curl --request POST --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
        --data "$(jq -n --arg text "$MESSAGE" '{text:$text}')" \
        "$NOTIFICATION_WEBHOOK_URL"
  rules:
    - if: $NOTIFICATION_WEBHOOK_URL
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"

release_notes:
  stage: notify
  script:
    - |
      NOTES_FILE="release-notes.txt"
      if [ ! -f "$NOTES_FILE" ]; then
        printf '%s\n\n%s\n' "$MR_TITLE" "$MR_DESCRIPTION" > "$NOTES_FILE"
      fi
      echo "Generating release notes from MR metadata"
      cat "$NOTES_FILE"
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - release-notes.txt
    expire_in: 1 week
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
